Feedback Sought from Ordinary Members of the Institute
(From Employees of Banks and Financial Institutions)
Before submitting the feedback please note that Institute's website contains most of the information required by members and there is a provision to download Admit Cards/Results/Consolidated Mark Sheets/ IIBF Vision etc. from the website, for which hard copy is not dispatched by Institute.
